summary: Terms page successfully implements the diner aesthetic with proper teal background, cream article card, correct typography hierarchy, and all required legal content sections. The page meets the screen spec requirements with proper back navigation, effective date display, and support contact information.

violations.description: The article card uses subtle shadow instead of the harder shadow treatment specified for legal longform content

actions: Consider adjusting the article card shadow to match the shadow-sm specification more precisely
Verify the shadow treatment aligns with the legal longform exception noted in the manifesto
